name: API Performance Anomaly Detection – Oracle UIM APIs
description: AI/ML-based anomaly detection capability that monitors Oracle UIM API performance patterns and distinguishes genuine service degradation from normal traffic variance.
strategic_outcome: Improving API observability and operational resilience by using AI to separate real degradation from normal demand variance across Oracle UIM APIs.
kpi: Reduce false performance alerts by 60%; improve detection accuracy above 95%; improve MTTD by 30%; improve MTTR by 6%
baseline_kpi: High operational noise from API latency and throughput variance
target_kpi: Distinguish real UIM API degradation from normal traffic variance with >95% detection accuracy
